response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and frameworks, with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, high-throughput systems, and scalable architectures directly matches the role's core requirements. His entrepreneurial and open-source contributions further highlight his problem-solving abilities and customer-centric mindset.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in high-throughput systems and AI-agent infrastructure
Entrepreneurial background with open-source contributions and scalable architectures
concerns: Limited exposure to Nest.js, the primary backend framework in the role
No direct experience with Vitest, the specified testing framework
Some roles focus on non-enterprise or non-automation tooling contexts
